title: UPI OC 156 Online Business Operations – Team Structure
text:
NPCI/UPI/2022-23/0C.156
To,

NAC)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

27" September, 2022

All Member Banks, UPI, IMPS, AePS, NFS and RuPay

Madam / Dear Sir,

Subject: Online Business Operations — Team Structure

Members are requested to note that following teams are formed to take care of Business Operational

activities.

Name

Broad Level Activities

Settlement and Reconciliation Team

N=

DaPRo

On time Settlement.

On boarding of members for existing and additional
services.

Resolution of settlement issues reported by members.
Back office and GST related queries.

Timely resolution of disputes, complaints and queries.
Implementation of reconciliation and dispute processes
for new enhancements and enhancements in existing
functionalities.

Relationship / Advisory Team

=

Interacting with Members as Single Point of Contact
(SPOC) for discussing and addressing member's
operational matters.

Improvement in Business Declines (BD), Dispute Ratio,
Deemed Acceptance, etc.

Working with Members towards operational excellence
(improvement of TATs, success rate of Online Dispute
Resolution (ODR), fine tuning of Settlement processing
etc.)

Please make the note of the above and disseminate the instructions contained herein to the officials

concerned.

Yours faithfully,

Cc / \ }\ |

Saiprasad Nabar

ENCL: Annexure A - Contact details of Settlement and Reconciliation Team.
Annexure B - Contact details of Relationship / Advisory Team.

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in
